---
title: "Limitations of current AI systems"
subtitle: "Part IV, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}"
---

## Learning outcomes

Students will be able to:

{{< include /_includes/learning-outcomes/_part-04_learning-outcomes.qmd >}}

## Select topics

-   Hallucinations
-   Flaws in reasoning
-   Alignment tax
